title: Create: Skies on Fire
description: A military-themed Create addon — build modular rockets with 7 warhead types, deploy FPV drones, and target strikes with Redstone. Fully integrated with Create's Ponder system.
body: # Create: Skies on Fire > **A military-themed addon for Create that adds buildable rockets, tactical warheads, and FPV drones to Minecraft.** --- ## 📋 Overview **Create: Skies on Fire** extends the Create mod with a full-featured rocketry and aerial warfare system. Build multi-stage rockets from modular components, arm them with a variety of warheads, and deploy FPV drones for reconnaissance — all integrated with Create's mechanical systems. --- ## 🚀 Rocketry System Build rockets from the ground up using a modular component system: | Component | Description | |---|---| | **Rocket Base** | Foundation block — every rocket starts here | | **Orbital Rocket Base** | Advanced base for inter-dimensional travel | | **Thrusters** (Copper / Standard / Brass) | Three tiers of propulsion with varying thrust and efficiency | | **Rocket Hull** | Stackable structural segments for height and durability | | **Nose Cone** | Aerodynamic cap — required for launch | | **Fuel Tank** | Stores fuel — more tanks = more range | | **Launch Pad** | Build a 3x3 platform for auto-refueling and reliable launches | ### Crafting Materials - 📋 **Rocket Blueprint** — preview required materials before building - 🛡️ **Heat-Resistant Plate** — crafted for hull and nose cone protection - ⚙️ **Rocket Engine Core** — the heart of every thruster --- ## 💣 Warheads & Payloads Arm your rockets with **7 types of payloads**, each with unique effects: | Payload | Effect | |---|---| | 📦 **Brass Payload** | Cargo container — transport items between locations | | 💥 **Explosive** | High-explosive detonation with large blast radius | | 🔥 **Incendiary** | Sets a wide area on fire | | 🟣 **Ender** | Teleports all entities in the blast zone | | ☁️ **Gas** | Releases a lingering toxic cloud (Poison + Weakness) | | 💣 **Cluster** | Splits into multiple smaller explosions over a wide area | | ☢️ **Fission** | Devastating nuclear explosion — the most powerful warhead | --- ## 🎯 Targeting System - **Redstone Targeter** (block) — place near your rocket to receive coordinates - **Remote Targeter** (item) — Shift+RMB on a block to save coords, then RMB on the Targeter to upload - **Warhead Detector** — scans the sky and emits a Redstone signal when incoming rockets are detected --- ## 🤖 FPV Drone System Deploy and control drones for reconnaissance and beyond: 1. **Place** the Brass FPV Drone on the ground 2. **Bind** a Drone Controller to it (Shift+RMB) 3. **Equip** Brass FPV Goggles in the helmet slot 4. **Activate** FPV mode by right-clicking the Controller 5. **Repair** damaged drones with the Repair Tool --- ## 🎓 Full Ponder Support Every single block and item includes a **detailed animated tutorial** through Create's Ponder system. Hold **W** while looking at any mod item to trigger its guide. All tutorials are available in **English** and **Russian**. --- ## ⚙️ Requirements - Minecraft **1.20.1** - Forge **47.4+** - Create **6.0+** --- ## 📝 MIT License
